positive: A stylized, mystical depiction of a roaring celestial lion. The lion should be rendered in a minimalist, elegant black silhouette, composed against a dramatic background of swirling nebulae and faint geometric cosmic dust. The central composition must feature the lion powerfully occupying the middle ground, with stylized, abstract gold filigree lines forming a cosmic halo and radiating light effect around its mane. The overall aesthetic is neo-geometric and celestial, utilizing stark contrast, deep indigos, brilliant gold accents, and crisp whites. Perfect for apparel printing, high contrast, symmetrical framing, symmetrical composition, vector quality, ethereal lighting, clean lines, detailed edges.
